agent:
Hey! We offer a pretty full range of services depending on what you're building. Our core work is brand identity and design, AI tool development and integration, website design and development, content strategy, and digital strategy consulting.

A lot of our clients come in wanting one specific thing like a logo or a website, and others want us to build a whole system that includes their brand, their digital presence, and AI automation to actually run parts of their business. We're flexible on scope and can work within your budget.

What's drawing you to exploring VVC right now? Are you looking to build something specific, or just exploring what's possible?

Great question. We keep it straightforward and collaborative.

First, we schedule a free 30-minute discovery call where we learn about your brand, goals, and what's actually keeping you up at night. We'll give you an honest assessment of what you need and where AI tools could genuinely help. Within 48 hours, you get a custom proposal with clear deliverables, timeline, and pricing—no surprises or hidden fees.

From there, we work in 2-week sprints with regular check-ins. You get direct access to Tiffany (no layers of project managers in between), and everything we build comes with documentation so you actually understand how it works and can maintain it yourself. When we're done, you get 30 days of support included, plus the option to work with us ongoing if you want.

Typical timelines are 3-4 weeks for brand identity, 4-6 weeks for a website, and 2-4 weeks for AI integration—but that really depends on what you're building.

Does that sound like the kind of process you're looking for?

visitor: "Do you work with clients outside St. Louis?"
